# Design System DNA

## Brand Identity (Locked)
MOGHARE360 Soft Run ERP — industrial repair shop aesthetic

## DNA Principles
1. **Professional** — navy primary, restrained shadows
2. **Operational** — clear status badges, KPI visibility
3. **Persian-first** — RTL typography, readable mixed numerals
4. **Safe prototype** — diagnostic blocks, demo banners
5. **Composable** — tokens → layout → components

## File Stack (Load Order)
1. moghare360-design-tokens.css
2. moghare360-rtl.css
3. moghare360-layout.css
4. moghare360-components.css

## Class Prefix
`m360-` — all design system classes

## Demo Entry
`public_html/assets/moghare360-ui/moghare360-demo.html`

## Not Included in M31
- JavaScript framework
- Icon font package (emoji/text placeholders in demo)
- PHP integration (Mission 32+)

## Final DNA Decision
Token-driven CSS with m360- prefix; RTL Persian default in demo.
